user_message: Give me the manager view on this Alpine Ski House meeting transcript. Manager is asking for an update today.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Brian Yamamoto <brian.yamamoto@alpineskihou.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-06 08:08 EST
Subject: Follow-up: escalation triage Review

There's been a change in our timeline for escalation triage. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

---
From: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
To: Brian Yamamoto <brian.yamamoto@alpineskihou.com>
Date: 2024-02-19 16:48 EST
Subject: Follow-up: escalation triage Review

Our team encountered some challenges with escalation triage. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

---
From: Brian Yamamoto <brian.yamamoto@alpineskihou.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-17 11:15 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Alpine Ski House escalation triage

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about escalation triage. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Alpine Ski House: the current vendor contract has a 90-day exit clause we need to plan around

handoffs.condition: MSX records need dark-period hygiene catchup

usability_anchors: Score 5: Complete, well-structured output matching the Dark-Customer Re-Emergence template with all required artifacts present and actionable
Score 3: Output covers main requirements but missing one or two secondary artifacts or lacking specificity
Score 1: Output is generic, missing key artifacts, or fails to address the specific request
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct escalation triage decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
